subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Consider the foolishness of the governments of Iran and the Ottoman Empire, how they banished Baha'u'llah from Iran to Baghdad and Istanbul... Perchance it is because of this that Jewish people will embrace the Cause, since there is no other course left to them.
subcodes.first_line_orig: انظروا جنون دولت ایران و دولت الاتراک کیف نفوا بهاء الله من ایران و بغداد
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @growth of the Cause, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
